title: TC4 Arcane Workbench GUI and container parity
parity_changes: Restored original tile slots: grid 0-8, output 9, wand 10.
Restored original menu slot order: output, wand, 3x3 grid, player inventory, hotbar.
Moved crafting from client button to output-slot take flow with server preview updates.
Removed recipe browser, search box and explicit craft button from the Arcane Workbench screen.
Restored original GuiArcaneWorkbench texture size 190x234 and primal aspect positions.
Added original-style insufficient vis display adapter.
Kept hidden legacy catalyst slot only as a Forge 1.19.2 save-migration adapter.
drift_found_and_fixed: Stage188 exposed a non-original catalyst slot and craft button; Stage189 moves catalyst use back into the 3x3 grid and output-slot take path.
Stage188 screen had browser/search UX; Stage189 removes it for strict TC4 parity.
adapter_notes: Client-side aspect display infers recipe costs from synced recipe metadata; server-side output preview and crafting remain authoritative.
The hidden legacy slot is not exposed in the GUI/menu and exists only to prevent older saves from losing data.
